description:
Operating Area: Greece

The Fountaine Pajot Thíra 80, christened “Sol Madinina,” is a luxury catamaran that epitomizes the height of elegance, comfort, and performance. This extraordinary vessel masterfully combines cutting-edge design with Fountaine Pajot’s decades of maritime expertise and dedication to excellence. From bow to stern, every inch of the Sol Madinina is crafted to deliver a yachting experience like no other.

Stretching an impressive 24 meters (nearly 79 feet) in length, the Thíra 80 offers unmatched space and versatility. Her expansive layout accommodates five lavish cabins, each meticulously designed for privacy and relaxation. The crown jewel of these accommodations is the master cabin, a private sanctuary complete with a personal jacuzzi—a rare and indulgent feature that sets the Sol Madinina apart from her peers. Each of the five cabins is also equipped with its own electric toilet, ensuring the utmost convenience and modernity for all guests on board.

The Thíra 80’s social and leisure areas are nothing short of breathtaking. The revolutionary addition of two side deck lounges with retractable balconies transforms the yachting experience, offering guests the sensation of sailing on a private cruise ship. These balconies create a seamless connection to the sea, inviting natural light and ocean breezes into the living spaces, and providing unparalleled views of the surrounding seascape. It’s a design touch that evokes the glamour and sophistication of a superyacht, while maintaining the intimacy and exclusivity of a private catamaran.

Every moment on board the Sol Madinina is one of infinite comfort. Her expansive flybridge provides the perfect setting for alfresco dining, sunbathing, or simply taking in panoramic views of the open ocean. With ample space for entertaining, guests can gather for cocktails at sunset or enjoy a moonlit dinner under the stars. Every surface, finish, and furnishing has been thoughtfully selected to create a harmonious blend of luxury and nautical precision.

Despite her grandeur, the Thíra 80 never fails to surprise. The seamless blend of style and functionality ensures she can meet and exceed her owner’s every expectation. Her sleek, modern design is complemented by state-of-the-art technology, ensuring superior sailing performance and ease of navigation. This flagship model does not just embody luxury—she redefines it.

The Sol Madinina’s name is fitting, evoking the warmth of the sun and the allure of far-off, exotic destinations. Whether gliding through calm waters or anchored in a serene bay, she remains a radiant beacon of refinement and style.

To sail aboard the Fountaine Pajot Thíra 80 “Sol Madinina” is to catch a shooting star and ride it across the horizon. It’s an invitation to dream bigger, sail further, and indulge in the extraordinary. For those seeking the ultimate yachting experience, the Sol Madinina promises a journey as unforgettable as the destinations she explores.

blueprint.name: SOL MADININA

amenities.label: TV in master and VIP suite
Wet bars (fore deck and fly bridge)

toys.label: Life Vests (8 pax Adults, 4 pax Children)
Board Games: Rummikub, scrabble, UNO, chess, backgammon, cards

entertainment: TV in master and VIP suite
tenders: Castoldi Jet Tender 17	with 170 HP engine (7-8 pax)

crew.name: Socrates Kouros
crew.bio:
Born: 1990 Nation: Greek | Languages: English, Greek, Spanish

Meet Socrates, an unwavering and conscientious mariner who embodies an exceptional level of commitment and reverence for the maritime world. With a lifelong passion for sailing and diving since the tender age of five, Socrates has cultivated over a decade of extensive experience in sailing, diving, training, and facilitating charters that have brought him in contact with individuals from every corner of the globe. Beyond his maritime prowess, Socrates stands as a professional sailing athlete, boasting notable accomplishments in Nationals, Europeans, and Worlds Championships. His accolades include an impressive 5th place finish in the World Youth Sailing Championship of 2007 and a commendable 8th place in the World Men’s Championship of 2008. These achievements not only underline his dedication but also his undeniable proficiency in navigating the competitive waters of the sailing arena. Yet, Socrates’s true distinction lies in his capacity to anticipate and surpass the expectations of each and every guest he encounters. However, his commitment to growth and improvement remains unwavering. As a mariner who thrives on adaptability and embraces the opportunity for constructive growth, he is consistently seeking ways to elevate his skill set and ascend to higher echelons within his field.
When Socrates isn’t traversing the seas, he finds solace and inspiration in his other passions. His degree in music synthesis is a testament to his aptitude for harmony both on and off the water. Additionally, his adventurous spirit extends to extreme sports, whether it’s conquering mountains or embracing the challenges of the open sea. In the capable hands of Socrates, you’re not just engaging a mariner; you’re inviting an embodiment of dedication, excellence, and ceaseless curiosity to join your team. With Socrates at the helm, you’re not merely navigating waters, but steering a course toward boundless horizons of maritime possibility.

crew.name: Konstantina Dania
crew.bio:
Born: 1998 | Nation: Greek

Born and raised by the sea, Konstantina has spent the majority of her life on board, cultivating a deep connection with maritime life. Her passion for sailing began at the age of seven when she started racing dinghy boats. This early immersion in the world of sailing ignited a lifelong love for the sea, which eventually guided her career path toward working on sailing yachts in her early adulthood.
It was during this time that Konstantina discovered her true culinary calling. Her natural creativity and curiosity in the kitchen blossomed as she embraced the unique challenges and inspirations that life at sea presented. Since then, she has dedicated herself to refining her culinary skills and broadening her gastronomic knowledge.
With years of experience as a yacht chef and a freelance culinary professional, Konstantina is driven by a singular goal: to create exceptional dining experiences that celebrate local ingredients and regional cuisine. Her approach to cooking emphasizes the flavors and traditions of each destination, transforming fresh, locally-sourced ingredients into thoughtfully curated dishes that connect guests to the places they visit.
Life onboard continues to fuel Konstantina’s creativity. The dynamic environment of yachting inspires her to push culinary boundaries and innovate her menus. Her passion for the craft, combined with her maritime roots, ensures that each dish she prepares tells a story — one that reflects the spirit of adventure, the beauty of the sea, and the richness of the world’s culinary heritage.
